top_signals.title: Japan Bond Yield Surge Deepens Regional Bank Stock Divide
top_signals.summary: Japan’s rising bond yields are likely to widen the stock performance gap between regional lenders with weaker investment portfolios and those with stronger holdings, according to analysts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: FTX’s former law firm, auditor agree to pay $66 million to settle customer claims over fraud
top_signals.summary: The law firm, Fenwick & West, denied wrongdoing and still faces a separate $525 million suit in Washington that is not covered by Friday's deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
